name: Kubernetes Service Mesh Platform
description: Production-grade Kubernetes platform with Istio service mesh, KrakenD API Gateway, Keycloak authentication, and ArgoCD GitOps. Features zero-trust architecture, dual Istio revisions, and complete observability.

name: Wordle AI Solver
description: Computer vision-powered Wordle solver that automatically detects and solves NYT Wordle puzzles. Features auto-grid detection, OpenCV image processing, and intelligent algorithm.

name: Chess AI with Computer Vision
description: Full-featured chess game with AI opponents and computer vision integration. Supports 2-player, PvAI, AIvAI modes, and potential Lichess online play.

name: Stock Price Prediction ML
description: ML-based stock price prediction using historical data and news sentiment analysis. Combines technical indicators with NLP for comprehensive market analysis.

name: Real-time Chat Application
description: Feature-rich chat app with friend requests, group chats, and integrated 2-player games. Built with Java and MySQL with real-time socket communication.

name: C/C++/Java IDE
description: Lightweight code editor and IDE for C, C++, and Java with syntax highlighting, code execution, and project management features.

name: TruPen Online Examination
description: Comprehensive online examination system for creating quizzes, scheduling tests, and analyzing student performance with detailed analytics.

name: Shopping App (C with GUI)
description: Desktop shopping application built in C with Windows GUI using windows.h. Features product browsing, cart management, and checkout.

name: P2P File Sharing
description: Peer-to-peer file sharing application with direct client connections, file transfer, and network discovery.

name: Ludo Game
description: Classic Ludo board game with multiplayer support and AI opponents.

name: Music Player System
description: Web-based music player with playlist management, audio controls, and library organization.

name: Minesweeper AI
description: Classic Minesweeper game with AI solver that uses logic and probability to solve puzzles.

name: P2P Video Streaming
description: Peer-to-peer video streaming application with real-time encrypted chat. Features secure socket connections, video transmission, and end-to-end encrypted messaging.
